title: rosa livescens var. speciosa
intro: Rosa livescens var. speciosa, also known as the fragrant rose, is a variety of rose plant that is native to China and is known for its fragrant and showy flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa livescens var. speciosa include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
